title: Moses Mbye
extract:
Moses Mbye (born 13 August 1993) is an Australian professional rugby league footballer who plays for Ipswich Jets in the Queensland Cup.
Over the course of his career he has played as a scrum-half, fullback, centre, stand-off and hooker. He previously played for the Canterbury-Bankstown Bulldogs, St. George Illawarra Dragons and Wests Tigers in the National Rugby League (NRL), and at representative level for the Prime Minister's XIII, World All Stars and Queensland in the State of Origin series.
